full_suite.failure_notes: Not rerun because repository tests directly or transitively open sealed protected-answer files. The earlier reduced attempt stopped at 1634 passed, 11 failed, 3 skipped with failures not proven pre-existing. The protected-safe focused suite passed 76/76 in 50.04s.

honest_issues: The exact wide suite remains unexecuted because it conflicts with the sealed protected-answer no-touch rule; original acceptance item 4 remains unmet, so the aggregate result is PARTIAL despite all 13 repair findings passing.
A legacy focused test and transitive ledger test had already byte-read sealed files earlier in the lane. No protected values were scored, tuned against, or used for training.
No E-v2 corpus training, GPU run, owner-41 score, or protected-50 score ran. VERIFIED=0 and REGISTERED_NOT_RUN remain binding.
The Cloud Billing proof procedure is statically validated but was not executed against live billing data.
The shared worktree contains unrelated concurrent changes; none were reverted or committed.
next: Run the same reviewer's unmodified repair harness. The GPU handoff is runs/lanes/trackD_ev2_design_20260722/VM_RUN_PLAN.md; do not authorize it until review acceptance and the unresolved protected/wide-suite policy are handled.
